name: InfluxDB
compose:
name: slashnode-influxdb
services:
  influxdb:
    image: influxdb:1.12.4
    container_name: influxdb-influxdb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      INFLUXDB_ADMIN_USER: admin
      INFLUXDB_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      INFLUXDB_HTTP_AUTH_ENABLED: 'true'
    volumes:
      - influxdb_data-influxdb:/var/lib/influxdb
  chronograf:
    image: chronograf:1.11.2
    container_name: influxdb-chronograf
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - influxdb
    environment:
      INFLUXDB_URL: http://influxdb-influxdb:8086
      INFLUXDB_USERNAME: admin
      INFLUXDB_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - chronograf_data-chronograf:/var/lib/chronograf
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8888:8888
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  influxdb_data-influxdb:
    name: slashnode-influxdb_influxdb_data-influxdb
  chronograf_data-chronograf:
    name: slashnode-influxdb_chronograf_data-chronograf
